case_title: BRAD SOWER MILLER ET AL VS. HILDA LAI ET AL

docket_entries.description: REPLY IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER (TRANSACTION ID # 100020937) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAI, HILDA TRUSTEE OF THE LAI FAMILY TRUSTED DATED MARCH 11, 1998
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-17-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HILDA LAI'S DEMURRER TO ALL FIVE CAUSES OF ACTION IN THE COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THERE IS NO BASIS TO SUSTAIN THE DEMURRER. HOWEVER, BECAUSE BOTH SIDES AGREE THAT THIS CASE SHOULD BE STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS BETWEEN THEM, WITHOUT NEED FOR A FORMAL MOTION OR APPLICATION, THE CASE IS NOW STAYED PENDING CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976 =302/HK

No other appearance is made in this matter

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Continued To Jul-26-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2016 Continued To Jan-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT HILDA LAI'S DEMURRER TO all five causes of action in the complaint
is overruled in its entirety. There is no basis to sustain the demurrer. However, because both sides agree that this case should be stayed pending the conclusion of arbitration proceedings between them, without need for a formal motion or application, the case is now stayed pending conclusion of the arbitration. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk
